characters.name: Thalren Deeproot
characters.description: A reclusive Earth Genasi hermit who channels the patience of stone through martial discipline.

characters.name: Kael Ironvow
characters.description: A disciplined Half-Orc soldier who fights with precision over brute force, wielding a longsword and shield.

characters.name: Lyris Songweaver
characters.description: A cheerful Halfling entertainer whose songs bolster allies and beguile foes.

characters.name: Brynna Ashward
characters.description: A direct human outlander whose rage makes her the front line for encounter testing.

characters.name: Sera Dawnmantle
characters.description: A steady human field-priest built to test healing, blessings, and shielded support play.

characters.name: Merrit Greenbough
characters.description: A watchful human hermit who tests nature magic, control spells, and wilderness utility.

characters.name: Oren Pathmark
characters.description: A quiet human guide built around ranged pressure, tracking skills, and light healing.

characters.name: Nyx Velorin
characters.description: A nimble human infiltrator for testing stealth, scouting, and precision attacks.

characters.name: Tavian Oathsteel
characters.description: A sworn human defender who tests high armor, weapon pressure, and early divine magic.

characters.name: Ivel Sparkvein
characters.description: A volatile human innate caster for testing cantrips, Shield, and simple arcane damage.

characters.name: Cassian Blackreed
characters.description: A pact-bound human caster for testing Eldritch Blast, Hex, and short-rest spell slots.

characters.name: Maelis Quill
characters.description: A prepared human scholar for testing broad first-level arcane spell coverage.

characters.name: Pip Coppercoil
characters.description: A practical human inventor for testing tool-flavored magic and support casting.

characters.name: [DEV] Maelis Quill (Lvl 5)
characters.description: A level 5 dev fixture for testing level 2 and 3 wizard spells like Misty Step and Fireball.

characters.name: [DEV] Sera Dawnmantle (Lvl 5)
characters.description: A level 5 dev fixture for testing level 2 and 3 cleric spells like Hold Person and Spirit Guardians.

characters.name: Borin Vance
characters.description: A scarred human soldier who swings the heaviest blade on the field.

characters.name: Lyrielle Vantas
characters.description: A sage-trained high elf wizard with a spellbook full of answers.

characters.name: Zerakha Bronzeplate
characters.description: A bronze dragonborn acolyte armored in faith and heavy plate.

characters.name: Vexa Emberhorn
characters.description: An infernal tiefling stage performer whose magic burns as bright as her act.

characters.name: Fizwick Cogglesworth
characters.description: An aging rock gnome noble who traded court life for the stage.

characters.name: Thorgrim Anvilmar
characters.description: A veteran mountain dwarf soldier sworn to the forge gods.

characters.name: Posy Underbough
characters.description: A lightfoot halfling with quick fingers and a quicker exit.

characters.name: Seraphel Dawnwhisper
characters.description: A hermit aasimar who bargained with something beyond the dawn.

characters.name: Mirri Swiftclaw
characters.description: A tabaxi wilderness guide who speaks for the wild places.

characters.name: Nyx Manyfaces
characters.description: A changeling street survivor who hunts wearing a hundred faces.

characters.name: Korag Frostpeak
characters.description: A frost giant goliath farmer whose temper froze long ago.

characters.name: Ghazka Tidebreaker
characters.description: An orc sailor whose fists hit harder than a boarding axe.

characters.name: Cindra Ashveil
characters.description: A fire genasi tinkerer running schemes for a shadowy faction.

characters.name: Vlaakith Szarn
characters.description: A githyanki raider who never misses twice.

characters.name: Sylvaris Frostbloom
characters.description: An elderly winter eladrin scholar who steals secrets, not coin.

characters.name: Unit Seven-Tin
characters.description: A young warforged who farms in peace and fights like a fortress.

characters.name: Bramwen Mosshollow
characters.description: A firbolg hermit channeling quiet thunder for the old faith.

characters.name: Corvan Duskwhisper
characters.description: A half-elf noble whose patron collects favors, not gold.

characters.name: Maelis Deepcurrent
characters.description: A triton sailor with a storm in his blood and a grudge to settle.

characters.name: Wrenna Thornquill
characters.description: A beastborn human guide whose spellbook smells of pine and rain.
